<!-- indicator: fig-oc-eco-wellbeing -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-oc-eco-wellbeing
#| fig-cap: 'The Impact of Economic Wellbeing in Orange County (n = 159)'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing The Impact of Economic Wellbeing in Orange County (n = 159).'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-oc-eco-wellbeing", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
